name: Polymarket Portfolio Tracker to Google Sheets

parameters.content:
## Polymarket Portfolio Tracker to Google Sheets

Syncs your Polymarket positions to a Google Sheet every hour for portfolio tracking and P&L analysis.

**Setup:**
1. Enter your Polymarket wallet address in the "Get My Positions" node
2. Create a Google Sheet with these column headers in Row 1:
   `Timestamp | Market | Outcome | Size | Avg Price | Current Price | Value | Cash P&L | Percent P&L | Total Portfolio Value`
3. Connect your Google Sheets credentials in the "Append to Sheet" node
4. Set the spreadsheet ID and sheet name in the Google Sheets node

**How it works:**
1. Fetches all your open positions from Polymarket every hour
2. Calculates current value, cost basis, and P&L for each position
3. Appends a timestamped row for each position to your Google Sheet
4. Includes a total portfolio value row at the end of each sync

**Tips:**
- Use Google Sheets charts to visualize P&L over time
- Create a pivot table to group by market for per-market performance
- The hourly snapshots give you a historical record of your portfolio value
